description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.7 Docker image for the test stage and the ilyasemenov/gitlab-ci-git-push image for the deploy stage, with two stages named test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs before_script commands: pip install virtualenv poetry pre-commit, virtualenv venv, source venv/bin/activate, poetry config virtualenvs.create false, poetry install --no-root, python manage.py migrate, and python manage.py collectstatic --noinput; cache the directories .cache/pip and venv/, set the variable PIP_CACHE_DIR to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip, then execute script commands: pre-commit run -a --hook-stage=manual and python manage.py test. In the deploy stage add a "deploy to production" job that runs only on the master branch, targets the production environment, uses the ilyasemenov/gitlab-ci-git-push image, and runs the command git-push ssh://dokku@projects.stavros.io:16022/spamnesty to push the code to a Dokku server.
